chain.thought: Explanation: The Cessna 404 Titan entered service in 1991. The next aircraft to come into service after that was the Piper PA-31 Navajo in 1993.

judge_thought: Explanation: The Cessna 404 Titan entered service in 1991. The next aircraft to enter service after 1991 is the Piper PA-31 Navajo, which has "in service since 1993." Other listed entries began later (2004, 2007, 2009), so 1993 is the immediate next.
